scripts.dev:infra: docker compose -f docker-compose.infra.yml up -d postgres redis --wait
scripts.dev:infra:down: docker compose -f docker-compose.infra.yml stop postgres redis
scripts.db:shell: docker compose -f docker-compose.infra.yml exec postgres psql -U postgres -d tech4um
scripts.db:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.infra.yml logs -f postgres redis
